zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor Percy於1308年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾可洛福吉-斯時，她的父親Sir Alexander de Percy68歲，母親Elizabeth Collville27歲。她於1329年與Sir John Clervaux I在英國英格蘭越可爾可洛福吉-斯結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eleanor Percy于1308年出生在英国英格兰越可爾可洛福吉-斯时，她的父亲Sir Alexander de Percy68岁，母亲Elizabeth Collville27岁。她于1329年与Sir John Clervaux I在英国英格兰越可爾可洛福吉-斯结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Percy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: nickname from Old French percehaie ‘pierce hedge’ (Old French percer ‘to pierce, penetrate’ + haie ‘hedge, fence’), perhaps with the sense of someone breaking into an enclosure. Percehaie is the name of one of the sons of the foxes Renart and Hermeline in the medieval French epic Roman de Renart, whose earliest known version is from the 1170s. The surname is older than that, but it may originate in a nickname for the fox as ‘enclosure piercer’, perhaps amounting to ‘chicken thief’.

habitational name from any of several places called Percy in Calvados, Eure, and Manche; William de Perci, the Domesday tenant-in-chief and under-tenant of Hugh, Earl of Chester, came from either Percy-en-Auge (Eure) or Percy (Manche).

variants.name: Piercey
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Percy  .

variants.name: Piercy
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Percy  .

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor Percy was born in 1308, in Croft-on-Tees, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Alexander de Percy, was 68 and her mother, Elizabeth Collville, was 27. She married Sir John Clervaux I in 1329, in Croft-on-Tees, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eleanor Percy est née en 1308, à Croft-on-Tees, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Alexander de Percy, avait 68 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Collville, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Clervaux I en 1329, à Croft-on-Tees, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eleanor Percy 1308 in Croft-on-Tees, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Alexander de Percy 68 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Collville 27. Sie hat 1329 in Croft-on-Tees, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Sir John Clervaux I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor Percy è nata il nel 1308 nel Croft-on-Tees, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Alexander de Percy, aveva 68 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Collville, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Clervaux I nel 1329, nel Croft-on-Tees, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie.

ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor Percy(이)가 1308년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 크로프트--티스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Alexander de Percy(은)는 68세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Collville(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1329년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 크로프트--티스에서 Sir John Clervaux I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다.
